hyperedges.label: Image BasePath System
hyperedges.rationale: next.config.js configures custom loaderFile pointing to image-loader.ts; both image-loader.ts and image-path.ts read NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH; together they form a cohesive basePath-aware image resolution system for GitHub Pages static export.

hyperedges.label: Nav Data Pipeline (API â†’ Adapter â†’ Layout)
hyperedges.rationale: layout.tsx calls getNavMenu() from api.ts, maps results through adaptNavItem() from adapters.ts, and falls back to fallbackNavData if empty â€” forming a complete Nav data fetch-transform-fallback pipeline.
